name: Bailey's Irish Cream Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix with a wooden spoon until well blended.
2. Allow to stand for 5 minutes.
3. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
4. Roll the balls in powdered sugar.
5. Allow to dry on a wire rack for 1 hour.
6. Roll in powdered sugar again if desired.
7. Store in an airtight container between layers of wax paper.
